word: H5898 - עִיר הַמֶּלַח - ʻÎyr ham-Melach - eer ham-meh'-lakh - The city of salt

sections.paragraph:
Original: עיר המּלח

Transliteration: ‛ı̂yr hammelach

Phonetic: eer ham-meh'-lakh

BDB Definition:

Ir-hammelech = "the city of salt"
  1. a place in the desert of Judah

Origin: from H5892 and H4417 with the article of substance interp

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
